hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit push\b'; then python3 ./scripts/check_alembic_heads.py; fi

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "A git push just completed. Post a release summary of what was shipped to the media-buys Slack channel (C08G7PJJ6NB) using the slack send message tool. Keep it concise: feature name, what it does for Joel, any action needed."}}'
